world.title: Trump warns Iran against tolls for Hormuz shipping
world.description: US President Donald Trump said on Truth Social that Iran is reportedly charging tankers in the Strait of Hormuz and must stop immediately.

world.title: Netanyahu-Trump Divisions on Iran War Threaten to Box In US
world.description: As Israel continues to strike Lebanon and Iran leverages the Strait of Hormuz, the shaky ceasefire deal is at risk from political fault lines that helped shape the conflict.

world.title: General Dan Caine Says US Forces Remain on Highest Alert in Gulf Region
world.description: According to reports from the Associated Press and Reuters, on April 8, U.S. top military commander General Dan Caine issued a stern warning, emphasizing that

world.title: Uganda: CID Impersonator Arrested in Anti-Handbag Snatching Operation
world.description: Police in Nateete are holding a 38-year-old man in connection with impersonation and a handbag snatching incident reported earlier this year.

world.title: East Africa: Nema Halts Illegal Construction On Lake Victoria Shoreline in Munyonyo
world.description: The National Environment Management Authority (NEMA) has ordered the immediate restoration of a degraded lake-shore protection zone on the protected lake-shore zone in Mulungu Village, Munyonyo Parish.

world.title: Uganda: Beyond Cars and Homes - Statewide Insurance Ushers in a New Era With Landmark Dog Insurance Cover
world.description: For decades, insurance in Uganda has been synonymous with protecting bricks and mortar, four-wheeled investments, and human life. But what about the four-legged family members guarding homes at night? What about the loyal companions that have become as much a part of the family as any child?

world.title: Uganda: France, EU Commit Shs735bn to Rehabilitate Nalubaale and Kiira Dams
world.description: The government of France and the European Union have committed Shs735 billion toward the rehabilitation of Uganda's Nalubaale and Kiira hydropower stations in Jinja, in a major boost to the country's clean energy ambitions.

world.title: Uganda: Rotaract Club of Kigo Seven Lakes Golf Hosts Mother Club President
world.description: The Rotaract Club of Kigo Seven Lakes Golf hosted its mother club president, Kin Kariisa, in a vibrant fellowship that highlighted service, innovation, and leadership development.

business.title: Tetracore Energy opens new CNG station in Benin
business.description: Tetracore Energy Group unveils a new auto compressed natural gas station in Benin to boost gas-powered mobility and downstream gas distribution in Nigeria.

business.title: Polaris Bank & CBN Launch Financial Literacy Initiative
business.description: Polaris Bank partners with the CBN for Global Money Week 2026, launching a financial literacy initiative to equip students with skills in saving and budget

business.title: Wema Bank Profit Doubles on Strong Lending & Digital Income
business.description: Wema Bank reports a 125.4% rise in profit after tax to N194.5bn for 2025, driven by strong lending, digital income, and improved efficiency.

business.title: Sunnystep: Singapore mum builds shoe brand after spinal injury
business.description: Mao Ting turned a debilitating spinal injury into Sunnystep, a comfort footwear brand now spanning 17 outlets across Singapore, Malaysia and Indonesia.

business.title: 2026 Zeekr X price and specs: Updated EV gets massive price cuts
business.description: The updated Zeekr X has been priced from $48,900 drive-away ahead of its May arrival – thousands less than before despite more power and equipment.

business.title: Access Holdings ED Calls for 'Less, But Better' Tech Focus
business.description: Access Holdings' Lanre Bamisebi advises tech leadership to prioritize simplification and stability over feature-heavy development in the age of AI.

business.title: Oil Opens Higher With Focus on US-Iran Ceasefire: Markets Wrap
business.description: (Bloomberg) -- Oil opened higher on Friday and US stock futures edged lower as Israeli strikes in Lebanon and the continued closure of the Strait of Hormuz damped optimism over a ceasefire to the Iran war.

science.title: Earth's 'oldest octopus' was not actually an octopus after all
science.description: Scientists uncover the truth behind a well-known fossil, Pohlsepia mazonensis, showing the "world's oldest octopus" was not an octopus.

science.title: Artemis moon missions a ‘gift that keeps on giving’ for research
science.description: Scientists celebrate impact of pioneering space flight, with data and samples gathered predicted to shape studies for decades to come

science.title: Artemis II in photos: around the moon and inside Orion
science.description: The dozens of photos taken by the astronauts include never before seen views of the moon, a total solar eclipse and a stunning shot of Earth.

science.title: Artemis II crew to return home as Nasa lays out steps for safe splashdown
science.description: Astronauts prepare for re-entry several miles off coast of southern California after 10-day lunar fly-by mission

science.title: 250-Million-Year-Old Fossil Confirms That Mammal Ancestors Laid Eggs, Solving a Long-Standing Mystery
science.description: A 250-million-year-old fossil of Lystrosaurus has uncovered new evidence that mammal ancestors, like this species, laid eggs.

science.title: ‘First contact’ that may have led to complex life on Earth finally witnessed by scientists
science.description: Stromatolites might look like rocks. But they are living relics of ancient systems that thrived on Earth billions of years ago.

science.title: Scientists say the world's oldest octopus fossil isn't an octopus after all
science.description: A 300-million-year-old tentacled sea creature has lost its crown as the world’s oldest octopus, after scientists found evidence that it’s not an octopus at all.

science.title: Artemis crew returning to Earth with 'all the good stuff' from Moon discoveries
science.description: The four astronauts said they were returning to Earth with "so many more pictures, so many more stories".

ai.title: Elon Musk's xAI sues Colorado over state's new AI law

ai.title: Exclusive-Anthropic weighs building it own AI chips, sources say
